gameContext.customOverride: Boulderdash: collect diamonds (+2 each); the exit door only opens after you hold 9 diamonds. GRAVITY IS THE KILLER: boulders (M on the map) fall straight down when nothing supports them — a falling boulder kills you instantly (-1). Never move into or stop in a square directly below a boulder, and never dig the dirt out from under a boulder while standing beneath it. Approach diamonds from the side or from below-and-diagonal, never up through a boulder column. Crabs and butterflies (E) kill on touch — keep 2+ squares away and turn away when one approaches. Digging through dirt is safe only when no boulder sits above your path.

0.customOverride: Level start: a boulder sits at your right shoulder — open by digging DOWN or LEFT, not right or up. The safest diamonds are below you and to the left. Re-check boulder columns after every plan.

gridLegend: @ = you, M = boulder (falls — never stand under one), $ = diamond, E = crab/butterfly (deadly), # = dirt/wall, O = exit door, . = empty
